---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Hi, I'm Cavan Donohoe

<!-- badges -->
[![GitHub followers](https://img.shields.io/github/followers/cavandonohoe?style=flat&logo=github&label=Followers)](https://github.com/cavandonohoe)
[![GitHub Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/cavandonohoe?affiliations=OWNER&style=flat&logo=github&label=Stars)](https://github.com/cavandonohoe?tab=repositories)

I'm a statistical programmer and R package developer. I picked up R in 2019 — `r lubridate::year(Sys.Date()) - 2019` years and counting — and it's been my primary tool ever since. I build R packages for clinical data pipelines, validated reporting, and reproducible analysis.

### What I work on

- 📦 R package development (roxygen2, testthat, pkgdown)
- 📊 Automated tables, figures, and listings with gt and ggplot2
- 🔁 Reproducible workflows and data pipelines
- 🧪 Statistical computing for clinical research

### Tech & tools

![R](https://img.shields.io/badge/-R-276DC3?style=flat&logo=r&logoColor=white)
![RStudio](https://img.shields.io/badge/-RStudio-75AADB?style=flat&logo=rstudio&logoColor=white)
![Git](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Git-F05032?style=flat&logo=git&logoColor=white)
![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/-GitHub-181717?style=flat&logo=github&logoColor=white)
![tidyverse](https://img.shields.io/badge/-tidyverse-1A162D?style=flat)
![gt](https://img.shields.io/badge/-gt-blueviolet?style=flat)

📫 cavandonohoe@gmail.com
🌐 [cavandonohoe.github.io](https://cavandonohoe.github.io/)
